notes: Bucket names are FIXED: 合同 / 会议纪要 / 项目报告 / 其他. Executor MUST use these exact directory names; categories_accept_set offers limited synonym tolerance (Chinese / English) but the prompt instructs the executor to use the four exact Chinese names.
其他 (other) bucket is hard-capped at 10 files. Overflow > 10 zeroes the discipline rubric line; > 15 triggers a §6 cap.
expected_classification_per_file is the supervisor's reference: every source filename maps to exactly one of the four buckets based on document content, not filename hint.
expected_summary_per_file gives the supervisor a one-line topic for each source; supervisors compare the executor's index.md summary against this for plausibility (not strict equality).
adversarial_anchors_5 list is the 5 cross-genre anchor files used by the §5 0.08 adversarial precision check.
adversarial_subset is the full set of cross-genre filename-vs-content files (filename hints toward bucket A but content belongs to bucket B); used as supervisor reference, not as a hard checkpoint.
Doc count reduced from 160 to 143 (v9): removed 17 generic personal-scratch docs to make 其他 ≤ 10 enforceable; remaining 10 其他 docs are genuinely no-topic personal notes.
Executor must not silently overwrite duplicate filenames — collisions require a numeric/v2 suffix.
Every source doc must be preserved under organized/.
